hero.headline: The Elite Gateway to Professional Mastery
hero.subheadline: Unlock exclusive access to high-impact projects and premier internships. Frelaunch is the ultimate ecosystem where Ethiopia's brightest students meet industry-leading enterprises.

how_it_works.title: Your Blueprint for Professional Success
how_it_works.subtitle: A high-performance journey from academic theory to industry mastery
how_it_works.label: The Strategic Roadmap
how_it_works.step1_desc: Craft a high-performance profile that showcases your unique skills, academic achievements, and career ambitions to our elite partner network.
how_it_works.step1_b4: Join as Talent or Enterprise Lead
how_it_works.step2_desc: Leverage our advanced AI matching engine to find opportunities tailored to your specific expertise. Apply with precision in just one click.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Complete high-value projects, earn industry-standard ratings, and build a verified portfolio that commands attention from global employers.

features.title: A Unified Growth Ecosystem
features.subtitle: Elite tools for high-achieving talents
features.label: The Competitive Edge
features.section_desc: Everything you need to discover, manage, and scale your professional career — integrated into one seamless, high-performance platform.
features.spotlight_desc: Our proprietary AI doesn't just find jobs; it identifies high-compatibility growth opportunities that align perfectly with your long-term career trajectory and unique skill set.
features.f1_desc: Advanced data visualization tracking your professional evolution with performance benchmarks and industry-standard milestones.
features.f2_desc: Streamlined project management with intelligent deadlines, automated priorities, and milestone-based deliverable tracking.
features.f3_desc: Seamless real-time collaboration — communicate instantly with enterprise leads, project mentors, and global team members.
features.f4_desc: Security without compromise. Every enterprise and opportunity is manually vetted to ensure a safe, high-quality, and professional environment.
features.cta_title: Ready to redefine your professional future?
features.cta_desc: Join 720+ elite student talents already scaling their careers on Frelaunch — initialize for free.
features.f_old1_desc: AI-powered job matching based on your skills and preferences.
features.f_old2_desc: Communicate instantly with managers and team members.
features.f_old3_desc: Track your skill growth with detailed analytics and insights.
features.f_old4_desc: Manage assignments and deadlines with our built-in task system.
features.f_old5_desc: Full support for English, Amharic, and Afan Oromo.
features.f_old6_desc: Enterprise-grade security to protect your data and privacy.

footer.tagline: The premier ecosystem connecting Ethiopia's top student talent with industry leaders through freelance and elite internship opportunities.
footer.vision_desc: Empowering the next generation of Ethiopian talent by bridging the gap between academic theory and high-impact professional industry excellence.
footer.community_invite: Join over 720+ high-achieving students already building their future on Frelaunch.

success_journey.label: Your Journey
success_journey.title: Built for Your
success_journey.subtitle: We don't just find you jobs. We provide a structured path to transition from a student to a high-demand professional.
success_journey.step1_desc: Architect a high-impact digital presence that highlights your unique talent stack and academic leadership.
success_journey.step2_desc: Our neural engine synchronizes your professional trajectory with high-compatibility enterprise opportunities.
success_journey.step3_desc: Evolve through high-value projects mentored by global industry veterans to sharpen your competitive edge.
success_journey.step4_desc: Graduate with a verified performance record and direct pipelines to top-tier global market leaders.
